message:
fix(aggregator): drain buffer on large gap reset + enforce dedup limits

SymbolReorderer::process previously called buffer.clear() when a
sequence gap exceeded max_sequence_gap, permanently dropping buffered
symbols that had been correctly received. Now drains them in sequence
order via std::mem::take before advancing.

SymbolDeduplicator::check_and_record now enforces the max_objects and
max_symbols_per_object config limits that were declared but never
checked, preventing unbounded memory growth under sustained load.

Add 4 regression tests covering both fixes and flush timeout drain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
